greeting: Hello! I'm here to help you with a mental health screening today. How are you feeling?
phq9_intro: Thank you for sharing. Now I'd like to ask you some specific questions to better understand how you've been feeling. These questions are part of a standard screening tool.
gad7_intro: Thank you. Now I have a few questions about anxiety and worry.
processing: Thank you for completing the assessment. I'm now analyzing your responses to generate your mental health screening report. This will take just a moment...
crisis_message: I'm concerned about what you've shared. Your safety is the top priority. Please reach out to a crisis counselor immediately.
disclaimer: This tool is an AI-based screening assistant and does not replace professional medical diagnosis.
